name: Cheesy Chicken Marinara
recipeIngredient: 4 skinless boneless chicken breast halves, cut into 1/2" strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a wok, heat 2 tablespoons olive oil over high heat until hot, swirling to coat sides of pan. Add chicken strips and stir-fry until cooked through, but still juicy, about 3 to 4 minutes. Remove to a plate.
2. In the same wok, heat remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil over high heat. Add mushrooms, onion, and garlic. Stir-fry until mushrooms are lightly browned, about 3 to 5 minutes. Return chicken to wok.
3. Pour in marinara sauce. Cook until heated through, about 3 minutes. Add mozzarella and parmesan cheeses. Sprinkle parsley on top. Cover and cook until mozzarella melts, about 1 to 2 minutes.
4. Serve over a bed of cooked spaghetti/pasta.
